Class NetBeansOutput

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.NetBeansOutput
public final class NetBeansOutput extends Object
Static utility for interacting with the NetBeans Output Window and its tabs.

This class provides methods to discover, inspect, and extract content from the various tabs in the IDE's Output Window (e.g., build logs, version control output). It leverages deep component hierarchy inspection to find the underlying JTextComponent instances for each tab.

Author:
anahata

      private static final String OUTPUT_TAB_CLASS
      The internal NetBeans class name for an output tab component.

  • Constructor Details

    • NetBeansOutput

      public NetBeansOutput()

  • Method Details

    • getMarkdownReport

      public static String getMarkdownReport() throws Exception
      Gathers information about all open output tabs and returns a Markdown report with tails. This method performs a single EDT run to gather all data.
      Returns:
      A Markdown string.
      Throws:
      Exception - if gathering fails.

    • listOutputTabs

      public static List<OutputTabInfo> listOutputTabs() throws Exception
      Lists all open output tabs.
      Returns:
      A list of OutputTabInfo.
      Throws:
      Exception - if gathering fails.

    • getTabContent

      public static String getTabContent(long id) throws Exception
      Retrieves the full text content of a specific output tab.
      Parameters:
      id - The tab identifier.
      Returns:
      The text content.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the tab is not found or content cannot be read.

    • getTabTailStatic

      public static String getTabTailStatic(long id, int maxLines)
      Retrieves the last few lines of text from a specific output tab efficiently.

      Instead of retrieving the entire document text, this method only extracts the end of the document to minimize memory pressure.

      Parameters:
      id - The tab identifier.
      maxLines - The maximum number of lines to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The tail of the output content, or an empty string if not found or empty.

    • findOutputTabsRecursive

      private static void findOutputTabsRecursive(Component component, List<OutputTabInfo> tabInfos)
      Recursively traverses the component hierarchy to find all output tabs.
      Parameters:
      component - The starting component.
      tabInfos - The list to populate with found tab information.

    • findTextComponent

      private static Optional<JTextComponent> findTextComponent(Component comp)
      Finds the first JTextComponent within a component hierarchy.
      Parameters:
      comp - The root component.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the JTextComponent if found.

    • findTextComponentById

      private static Optional<JTextComponent> findTextComponentById(long id)
      Finds a text component by its identity hash code.
      Parameters:
      id - The identity hash code.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the JTextComponent if found.

    • findTextComponentRecursive

      private static Optional<JTextComponent> findTextComponentRecursive(Component component, long targetId)
      Recursively searches for a text component with a matching identity hash code.
      Parameters:
      component - The starting component.
      targetId - The target identity hash code.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the JTextComponent if found.
